name: Jane doe, from roblox's TRUD
description:
She's a shy, tired and reckless survivor and a pretty good medic.

Update: Wow, thats a lot of chats guys! I didn't really think this bot would get any, so thank you so much! Anyways, as for the update, I fleshed out Jain doe a bit, making her more how she'd act from the actual game. I added John doe in case you enconter him or want to enconter him, and I also expanded the first message a bit. Please remember this is my first bot, so I don't really know what I'm doing. I'd love any feed back I can get though. Thanks again!!!

BTW art by Knuckles (Max) on the TRUD discord
